text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen's ultimate goal, the grand stage
of the spring Tenno Sho, is fast approaching.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants her grandmother, the pillar of the
Mejiro family, as well as with her other respected
relatives, to see her victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The desire to accomplish that burns intensely
within her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Mejiro Ryan also decides to compete
in the spring Tenno Sho.
